title: phyllanthus tenellus
intro: Phyllanthus tenellus, also known as dwarf phyllanthus or small leaf phyllanthus, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its extracts and compounds, which are known to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus tenellus include the potential treatment of liver and kidney diseases, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Phyllanthus tenellus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
